title: EditBox
text: EditBox Default logical widget for entering and displaying data in a field in a Form or Report. Table 1. Widget Overview Logical widget name: EditBox Maps to physical widget: ueditbox Default definition: EditBox=ueditbox(font=editfont;autoselect=on;dimmedbackcolor=off) Supported triggers and properties: See ueditbox (EditBox) . Use for: Fields of any data type except Image. Supports Accessibility? Yes, for testing purposes and screen readers only. For more information, see Accessibility . Description The EditBox is the default widget used for component fields in forms and reports. If the field's Widget Type is not specified, or if the specified widget type is not available at runtime for some reason, the EditBox logical widget is used. Related Links Unifields Unifields are field representations for displaying and entering data in character mode. They also work in Windows, but support only basic video attributes (bright, underline, inverse, and blink). They do not support proportional fonts or other properties. Was this topic helpful?
